'''鈭歞h-p-y''' ('''kadhapay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stain|stain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stain|stain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-p-y
|-
! Lemma
| kadhapay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhapay|thidhapay]] || [[word:jidhapay|jidhapay]] || [[word:shidhapay|shidhapay]] || [[word:kidhapay|kidhapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhapay|thuthudhapay]] || [[word:jujudhapay|jujudhapay]] || [[word:shushudhapay|shushudhapay]] || [[word:kukudhapay|kukudhapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhapay|thudhapay]] || [[word:judhapay|judhapay]] || [[word:shudhapay|shudhapay]] || [[word:kudhapay|kudhapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhapay|thudhapay]] || [[word:judhapay|judhapay]] || [[word:shudhapay|shudhapay]] || [[word:kudhapay|kudhapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhapay|thedhapay]] || [[word:jedhapay|jedhapay]] || [[word:shedhapay|shedhapay]] || [[word:kedhapay|kedhapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhapay|thothodhapay]] || [[word:jojodhapay|jojodhapay]] || [[word:shoshodhapay|shoshodhapay]] || [[word:kokodhapay|kokodhapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhapay|thodhapay]] || [[word:jodhapay|jodhapay]] || [[word:shodhapay|shodhapay]] || [[word:kodhapay|kodhapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhapay|thodhapay]] || [[word:jodhapay|jodhapay]] || [[word:shodhapay|shodhapay]] || [[word:kodhapay|kodhapay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]] || [[word:dhapay|dhapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhapay|th忙dhapay]] || [[word:j忙dhapay|j忙dhapay]] || [[word:sh忙dhapay|sh忙dhapay]] || [[word:k忙dhapay|k忙dhapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhapay|thathadhapay]] || [[word:jajadhapay|jajadhapay]] || [[word:shashadhapay|shashadhapay]] || [[word:kakadhapay|kakadhapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhapay|thadhapay]] || [[word:jadhapay|jadhapay]] || [[word:shadhapay|shadhapay]] || [[word:kadhapay|kadhapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhapay|thadhapay]] || [[word:jadhapay|jadhapay]] || [[word:shadhapay|shadhapay]] || [[word:kadhapay|kadhapay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhapay|shadhapay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhapay|goshadhapay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhapay|gokishadhapay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhapayn眉|shadhapayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkn眉|goshadhapaynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhapayn眉|gokishadhapayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhapaysh毛|shadhapaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhapaynksh毛|goshadhapaynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhapaysh毛|gokishadhapaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhapayro|shadhapayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkro|goshadhapaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhapayro|gokishadhapayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhapaymu|shadhapaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkmu|goshadhapaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhapaymu|gokishadhapaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhapaysher|shadhapaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhapaynksher|goshadhapaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhapaysher|gokishadhapaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhapayng|shadhapayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkng|goshadhapaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhapayng|gokishadhapayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhapayya|shadhapayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkya|goshadhapaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhapayya|gokishadhapayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhapayyam|shadhapayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkyam|goshadhapaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhapayyam|gokishadhapayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhapayn眉sh毛|shadhapayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkn眉sh毛|goshadhapaynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhapayn眉sh毛|gokishadhapayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhapayn眉ro|shadhapayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkn眉ro|goshadhapaynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhapayn眉ro|gokishadhapayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhapayn眉mu|shadhapayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkn眉mu|goshadhapaynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhapayn眉mu|gokishadhapayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhapaysh毛n眉|shadhapaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhapaynksh毛n眉|goshadhapaynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhapaysh毛n眉|gokishadhapaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhapaysh毛ro|shadhapaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhapaynksh毛ro|goshadhapaynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhapaysh毛ro|gokishadhapaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhapaysh毛mu|shadhapaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhapaynksh毛mu|goshadhapaynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhapaysh毛mu|gokishadhapaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhapayron眉|shadhapayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkron眉|goshadhapaynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhapayron眉|gokishadhapayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhapayrosh毛|shadhapayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkrosh毛|goshadhapaynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhapayrosh毛|gokishadhapayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhapayromu|shadhapayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkromu|goshadhapaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhapayromu|gokishadhapayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhapaymun眉|shadhapaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkmun眉|goshadhapaynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhapaymun眉|gokishadhapaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhapaymush毛|shadhapaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkmush毛|goshadhapaynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhapaymush毛|gokishadhapaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhapaymuro|shadhapaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhapaynkmuro|goshadhapaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhapaymuro|gokishadhapaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
